name: Kathmandu
tagline: Himalayan Culture and Adventure at Rock-Bottom Costs
description: Kathmandu is a city of ancient temples, stunning mountain views, and one of the lowest costs of living in the world. Nestled in a valley surrounded by the Himalayas, it offers a unique blend of Hindu and Buddhist culture, world-class trekking, and a growing modern infrastructure. For FIRE seekers willing to embrace a different pace of life, Kathmandu delivers extraordinary value and unforgettable experiences.

quickFacts.visa: Visa on arrival (15/30/90 days); renewable up to 150 days/year
quickFacts.language: Nepali, with some English in tourist areas
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate – generally safe; watch for petty theft and traffic
quickFacts.climate: Subtropical with monsoon season and cool winters

housing.description: Spacious 2BR apartment in Lazimpat or Jhamsikhel with mountain views

dining.description: Dal bhat at local restaurants daily; momos and Newari cuisine 4-5x/week

healthcare.description: Private health insurance covering Norvic and Grande hospitals

transportation.description: Local buses, shared taxis, and occasional ride-hailing

entertainment.description: Temple visits, hiking in the valley, yoga classes, Thamel nightlife

1M.lifestyle: A spacious apartment in Lazimpat or Jhamsikhel, eating dal bhat and momos at local restaurants most days, and getting around by shared taxis and ride-hailing. Private health insurance covers the better Kathmandu hospitals. Trekking and hiking in the valley are cheap and accessible. Air pollution, power reliability, and chaotic traffic are real daily tradeoffs, but the cost of living is remarkably low.

housing.description: Large 3BR house or apartment in Budhanilkantha or Sanepa with garden

dining.description: Mix of upscale restaurants in Durbarmarg and Thamel; international cuisine options

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance with medical evacuation coverage to Delhi or Bangkok

transportation.description: Own motorbike or small car; occasional domestic flights to Pokhara

entertainment.description: Guided treks, rafting trips, mountain biking, cultural festivals, regular Pokhara getaways

2M.lifestyle: A large house with a garden in Budhanilkantha or Sanepa, your own motorbike or small car, and dining at good restaurants in Durbarmarg and Thamel several times a week. Premium health insurance with medical evacuation coverage to Delhi or Bangkok. Domestic flights to Pokhara and guided treks are comfortably within budget. Significant monthly margin given Kathmandu's low costs.

housing.description: Premium 4BR villa in Budhanilkantha or luxury apartment in Maharajgunj

dining.description: Finest restaurants in Kathmandu, boutique cafes, regular dinner parties at home

healthcare.description: International health insurance with coverage at top hospitals in Delhi, Bangkok, and Singapore

transportation.description: Own SUV for mountain roads, domestic flights, helicopter tours

entertainment.description: Helicopter tours to Everest Base Camp, luxury trekking, paragliding in Pokhara, cultural immersion

3M.lifestyle: A large villa in Budhanilkantha or Maharajgunj, an SUV suited to mountain roads, and regular dining at the best restaurants in Kathmandu. International health insurance covering top hospitals in Delhi, Bangkok, and Singapore. Helicopter tours and domestic flights for trekking trips. This budget far exceeds what Kathmandu's cost of living can absorb, leaving room for frequent international travel.

housing.description: Sprawling estate in Budhanilkantha or custom-built villa with panoramic Himalayan views

dining.description: Private chef plus regular dining at Kathmandu's finest restaurants and hotels

healthcare.description: VIP concierge medical service with Singapore and Bangkok hospital access

transportation.description: Luxury SUV with driver, regular domestic flights, helicopter charters

entertainment.description: Private Everest expeditions, luxury lodge trekking, international travel, cultural patronage

domesticHelp.description: Full-time cook, housekeeper, gardener, driver, and security guard

luxuryExtras.description: First-class international travel, luxury trekking expeditions, philanthropy, property investments

5M.lifestyle: A large estate with panoramic Himalayan views, a housekeeper, cook, gardener, and driver. A nice SUV for mountain trips, business class flights for international travel, and premium healthcare with Singapore and Bangkok hospital access. Helicopter tours and lodge-based trekking in the Himalayas are routine. Nepal's extremely low costs mean most of this budget goes unspent each month.

housing.description: Grand estate compound with guest houses, or multiple properties including a Pokhara lakeside retreat

dining.description: Personal chef team, catered events, exclusive dining experiences

healthcare.description: Elite global health plan, personal physician, annual executive screening in Singapore

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles with dedicated drivers, private helicopter, international first-class flights

entertainment.description: Private mountaineering expeditions, global luxury travel, art collecting, cultural festival patronage

domesticHelp.description: Full compound staff: chef, butler, housekeepers, gardeners, security team, personal assistant, driver team

luxuryExtras.description: Philanthropic foundation, property development, private expedition sponsorship, global first-class travel

10M.lifestyle: A premium estate with full household staff, multiple vehicles with drivers, and first class international flights. Top-tier global health coverage and a cook several times a week. This budget is far beyond what Nepal's economy can absorb in spending. Most people at this level maintain a Kathmandu home as an affordable base for Himalayan access and travel globally for much of the year.
